title: geranium × oxonianum f. thurstonianum
intro: Geranium × oxonianum f. thurstonianum, also known as Geranium Thurstonianum, is a cultivar of the geranium plant species, which is a hybrid of Geranium maculatum and Geranium phaeum. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Geranium Thurstonianum include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Geranium Thurstonianum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
